Simple Pricing

Choose the perfect plan for your development needs. Start free and scale as you grow.

Free

$0forever

Perfect for hobbyists and learning

  • Basic code completion
  • 5 AI providers
  • 500 AI messages/month
  • VS Code extension
  • Community support
Most Popular

Pro

$19/month

For professional developers

  • Advanced code completion
  • All 50+ AI providers
  • Unlimited AI messages
  • Smart refactoring
  • Automated testing
  • MCP integrations
  • Priority support

Enterprise

Custom

For large teams and organizations

  • Everything in Pro
  • Custom AI model fine-tuning
  • Advanced security & SSO
  • Team analytics dashboard
  • Dedicated account manager
  • SLA guarantee
  • 24/7 phone support
  • On-premise deployment option

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I switch plans anytime?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

Is there a free trial?

Pro plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. You can explore all features before committing.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for enterprise plans.

Can I cancel anytime?

Absolutely. Cancel anytime with no questions asked. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

Still Have Questions?

Our team is here to help you find the perfect solution for your needs.

Contact Sales
